page_title: Moshimo Kono Sekai de Kimi to Boku ga Deae Nakattara
text:
Moshimo Kono Sekai de Kimi to Boku ga Deae Nakattara (もしもこの世界で君と僕が出会えなかったら, If You And I Can't Come Into This World) is the third OVA ending theme, and the sixth and seventh ending themes of the Hunter × Hunter 1999 anime adaptation. Sunflower's Garden sang it, and the same song was used for two different variations of the ending. 

Characters in Order of Appearance

Ending 6:

Ending 7:

Leorio Paradinight
Kurapika
Killua Zoldyck
Gon Freecss
